title: Machine learning & AI solutions
text: Designing and deploying CNN, NLP, and OCR models for advanced automation, medical imaging, and text classification systems.

title: Cloud engineering & deployment
text: Architecting resilient, secure, and scalable cloud solutions following best practices on AWS for real-time logistics and resource monitoring.

title: Full stack web development

title: Core systems & data structures
